name: Mihir Sharma
tagline: A seasoned Senior Full-Stack and Mobile Engineer with 5+ years of experience, expertly crafting and deploying robust, high-performance web and cross-platform mobile applications.
about: Consistently deliver high-performance, scalable digital solutions by expertly translating complex UI/UX designs across diverse industries. My experience encompasses real-time operational hospitality dashboards, corporate healthcare SaaS platforms, and premium luxury e-commerce experiences. I am adept at leveraging modern engineering standards to drive product quality, significantly reduce user churn, and enhance interface responsiveness.
currentRole: Senior Software Engineer at Enterprise Technology Solutions Studio
highlights: Architected, developed, and deployed robust full-stack web and cross-platform mobile applications.
Translated complex UI/UX designs into high-performance digital solutions.
Experience across real-time operational hospitality, corporate healthcare SaaS, and luxury e-commerce.
Adept at driving product quality, reducing user churn, and enhancing interface responsiveness.
Led an agile engineering squad of 4 developers creating customer-centric SaaS platforms and enterprise tools.
Standardized code governance pipelines and continuous deployment workflows, accelerating feature delivery by 25%.

projects.name: Zenflow - Clinical Workflow & Provider Management Dashboard
projects.description: Architected and developed a comprehensive SaaS dashboard for healthcare provider management, significantly optimizing clinical workflow efficiency. Engineered a low-latency, dynamic weekly scheduling calendar grid, integrated secure operational metrics tables, modular analytics panels, and comprehensive client views to effectively monitor practitioner utilization.

projects.name: Solitare - Premium Headless E-Commerce Jewelry Platform
projects.description: Developed a visually stunning and highly responsive headless e-commerce interface, enabling rich media interaction for a premium luxury jewelry catalog. Implemented advanced features including localized category filters, persistent client-side states, high-fidelity item grids, and seamless customer favorites/wishlist mechanics. Optimized modern asset delivery networks and lazy-loading techniques, achieving a 35% improvement in First Contentful Paint (FCP).

projects.name: Pizza – Real-Time Hospitality Outlet Management Application
projects.description: Engineered a tablet-optimized, real-time outlet operations and layout management dashboard, specifically designed to minimize operational friction in high-volume dining environments. Developed an interactive live floor-plan manager with persistent state updates and automated alert systems. Established a centralized telemetry pipeline for key performance metrics, successfully lowering seating friction intervals by 18%.

projects.name: Trinity – Personalized Mental Health & Wellness Mobile Application
projects.description: Designed and developed a user-centric cross-platform mobile application dedicated to mental well-being, behavioral habits, and telehealth access. Created a smooth, interactive daily mood journaling module, incorporating specialized feedback and micro-interactions that boosted user retention by 22%. Implemented encrypted synchronization endpoints to ensure secure user data transmission and streamline clinical consultation booking.
